description: Repair cockpit AI connectivity to Ubuntu-hosted Ollama and return proof. Enforce an active Ollama base URL, ensure qwen2.5-coder:7b and qwen2.5vl:7b are available, patch cockpit backend/frontend config for the validated endpoint, restart cockpit backend, and verify /api/llm/health is configured and /api/llm/chat responds with degraded=false.
